subject: chore(wrap): session-end cleanup — favicon legacy removal + 9 minor fixes
body:
Wrap-pass sweep at session end. Each item is small on its own; together
they remove a legacy asset, harden two failure paths, tighten the
verify suite, and resync the docs.

Cleanups:
- assets/images/favicon.png: removed end-to-end. Dropped web.favicon
  from app.json, deleted the file, removed it from generate-icons.mjs
  ICONS_ANY, removed the row from CLAUDE.md icon table. Verified after
  Metro cache clear: zero references in dist. Expo Router output:"static"
  ignores web.favicon — +html.tsx emits /favicon.ico directly.
- public/sw.js: pruned CACHE_VERSION comment block from v9+v10 history
  to current rationale only. Git tracks the prior versions.
- scripts/inject-icon-hashes.mjs: replaced an awkward self-Q&A comment
  with a plain statement; idempotency rationale unchanged.

Hardening:
- utils/debugRootMount.ts: createRoot throws now also push to
  window.__debugPushError so the pre-React inline pill's DOM fallback
  surfaces the failure visually. Without this, a mount-time React
  failure would only land in the in-memory buffer that the failed pill
  was supposed to display.
- hooks/usePWAUpdate.ts: documented why _lastPeriodicCheckAt is
  module-scope and intentionally survives HMR (matches the lifetime
  of the interval + visibilitychange/pagehide/pageshow listeners it
  throttles). Prevents a future reader from "fixing" it.

Verification + tooling:
- scripts/verify-inline-scripts.mjs: added 3 new assertions —
  @icon-cache-bust:begin marker present, :end marker present, block
  contains a parseable PWA_ICON_PATHS array. Catches future edits
  that would orphan inject-icon-hashes.mjs before it throws on the
  next build. Suite now 47/47 (was 44/44).
- scripts/inject-icon-hashes.mjs: added --help flag describing
  inputs / side-effects / fail-loud conditions, with pointer to
  CLAUDE.md § Icon Cache Busting.

Docs:
- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md: rewritten with a fresh snapshot covering the
  seven fleet-alignment tasks landed on this branch (was stale —
  only described the first task).
- docs/TODO.md: added a delete-on-verify reminder to the High Priority
  live-browser entry. Each subsection's bullets get deleted (not
  struck-through) as they're verified; the parent entry only goes once
  every subsection is empty.
- CLAUDE.md: tightened the BURGER_MENU row in § Pattern Adoption Status
  so the "ModalBackdrop helper IS adopted" caveat is co-equal with the
  not-applicable verdict, not buried in a parenthetical.

Verification:
- npx tsc --noEmit: 0 errors
- npm run build:web (after Metro cache clear): clean, dist has zero
  favicon.png references
- npm run verify:inline-scripts: 47 passed, 0 failed
- node scripts/inject-icon-hashes.mjs --help: prints help and exits
- node scripts/inject-icon-hashes.mjs (no args): byte-identical
  output on unchanged icons (idempotent)

Tags: cleanup, code-quality, docs, pwa, verify
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
